title: A Bloodline Marked for Death
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #10, Scopper Gaban, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Celestial Dragons as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This is bad! Pirates are here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What is the Navy Doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If anything happens to us, we'll hang you all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Come in!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PLEASE BE ADVISED!! THE WEST COAST IS A DANGER ZONE!!

dialogue.speaker: Scopper Gaban
dialogue.text: The Roger Pirates have docked there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a miracle you're not both crying after all this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's going on?! is this the end of the world?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get the celestial dragons to the center of the island! Don't let them get hurt!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: First Rocks, now Roger?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: JOM!!

dialogue.speaker: Scopper Gaban
dialogue.text: The Roger Pirates have made Landfall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: JWAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm here to save you, shaky!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys have no chance with her! Focus on stealing the treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Save Shaky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Buheah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: SWORRY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: TCH... I guess the game's over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Do something!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pull those marines back, and see to it that the celestial dragons are protected!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The Knights of God are Rallying!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pirates keep pouring in from every side of the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Warships, Commerce Retailatory Fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't let them land!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I think we're done for!!!

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
